caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Save this itinerary for your next trip to Sarasota, Florida! ☀️

-Fly into Sarasota-Bradenton International Airport

-Go to Selby Botanical Gardens

-Breakfast at Toastique 

-Go to Siesta Key Beach

-Lunch at Focaccia Sandwich and Bakery

-Go to the Ringling Museum

-Dinner at the Cottage on Siesta Key

-Sunset on Siesta Key Beach

#siestakey #sarasotaflorida #floridavacation #floridahiddengems #floridabeaches

transcription.text: Here's how to spend the perfect weekend getaway in Sarasota, Florida. And yes, you're going to want to steal this itinerary. Fly into Sarasota Bradenton International Airport or road trip and check into an Airbnb on Siesta Key. This is the one I stayed at, and it was only 200 yards to the water's edge on Siesta Key Beach through Beach Access 4. All of the Siesta Key village restaurants, bars and live music were within walking distance as well. You're going to start off by going to Selby Gardens, which is a botanical garden on Sarasota Bay. Here, you'll feed the koi fish and enjoy the diverse collection of trees and plants through the gorgeous walking paths. Grab breakfast at Toastique in downtown Sarasota, where they have unique toasts and fresh pressed juices. Then you're going to hit the beach. There are over 35 miles of beaches in Sarasota, and Siesta Key Beach is perfect for the beach lover with its powdery white quartz sand and crystal clear blue water. Grab lunch at Focaccia Sandwich and Bakery for the most inventive and delicious focaccia sandwiches in the area. Then you're going to the Ringling Museum, which will make you feel like you just stepped into Europe. This place is perfect for the art lover because there's a massive collection of art and antiquities dating back 4,500 years. The grounds are absolutely stunning with so many banyan trees and an award winning playground for kids. You will get dinner at the Cottage on Siesta Key for amazing drinks and food in a beachy atmosphere. Be sure to sit on the back patio for live entertainment. My favorite singer is the amazing and beautiful Sarah Fleener. You'll end the evening with sunset on the beach after a long.
